Afghanistan.notes: Visitors born in Afghanistan do not require a visa.. All visitors are fingerprinted, and are required to register with the Ministry of Foreign Affairs upon arrival.. The Taliban accepts visas issued by diplomatic missions not under its control.. e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL)..

Algeria.notes: Application for a tourist visa to Algeria must be accompanied either by a certificate of accommodation.. Persons may be denied entry if entering with a passport containing visas or stamps issued by Israel..

Antigua and Barbuda.notes: Holders of a visa or residency issued by Canada, USA, United Kingdom or a Schengen Member State can obtain a visa upon arrival that costs USD 100 for a maximum of 30 days..

Argentina.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.. Uruguayans can live and work legally in Argentina under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check.. Visitors are fingerprinted (Right thumb fingerprint) and photographed upon entry.. Uruguayans may request lawful permanent resident status in Argentina at any time..

Australia and territories.notes: May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa)..

Austria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. Residence permit ( Aufenthaltstitel ) for stays of longer than 90 days obtainable after arrival under certain conditions..

Bangladesh.notes: Available at Dhaka, Chittagong, and Sylhet international airports..

Belarus.notes: Must arrive and depart via Minsk International Airport..

Belgium.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Benin.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.. e-Visas are available for 30 or 90 days..

Bhutan.notes: Sustainable Development Fee of 200 USD per day for almost all visitors to Bhutan.. Holders of an application for a tourist visa can obtain a visa on arrival..

Bolivia.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.. Uruguayans can live and work legally in Bolivia under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Bosnia and Herzegovina.notes: 90 days within any 6-month period.. Registration with the local police within 24 hours of arrival is mandatory..

Brazil.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.. Uruguayans can live and work legally in Brazil under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check.. Uruguayans may request lawful permanent resident status in Brazil at any time..

Bulgaria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Burkina Faso.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Burundi.notes: Visa on arrival obtainable at Bujumbura International Airport, and all land borders..

Cambodia.notes: Visa is also obtainable online.. All visitors are fingerprinted upon arrival and departure..

Cameroon.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis and current immunization records required..

Cape Verde.notes: Not available at all entry points..

Chile.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.. Uruguayans can live and work legally in Chile under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

China.notes: Visa-free from 1 June 2025 until 31 December 2026.. Visa free for Hong Kong SAR, China and Macau SAR, China for 90 days..

Colombia.notes: 90 days – extendable up to 180-days stay within a one-year period.. Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.. Uruguayans can live and work legally in Colombia under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Republic of the Congo.notes: Visa not required for passengers with a V.I.P invitation letter.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.. A letter of invitation or written proof of a hotel reservation is required..

Democratic Republic of the Congo.notes: Passenger with a letter (Visa Volant) issued by the Ministry of Interior and Security can obtain a visa on arrival.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.. Registration required..

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport..

Croatia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Cuba.notes: Can be extended up to 90 days with a fee..

Czech Republic.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Denmark.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Dominican Republic.notes: Can be extended up to 120 days.

Ecuador.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.. Uruguayans can live and work legally in Ecuador under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Egypt.notes: e-Visa issued for 30 days.. Visa-free travel for tourists arriving at Sharm El Sheikh, St. Catherine, or Taba airports and remaining in the Sinai resorts up to 15 days..

Estonia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Ethiopia.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport..

Finland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

France and territories.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Gabon.notes: e-Visas are available for one to six months.. Electronic visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Germany.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Ghana.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.. Multiple entry visa valid for 1 year from date of issue upon arrival into Ghana is mandatory..

Greece.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Guinea.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Hungary.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Iceland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa..

Italy.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Jordan.notes: Visa can be obtained upon arrival, it will cost a total of 40 JOD, obtainable at most international ports of entry and land border crossings. (except King Hussein/Allenby Bridge ). Not available at King Hussein/Allenby Bridge.

Kazakhstan.notes: Visitors arriving from a country without Kazakh representation and holding an invitation letter, can obtain a single entry visa on arrival for a max. stay of 1 month..

Kenya.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.. eTA fee is 32.50 USD.. Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries..

Kiribati.notes: May not exceed 90 days within any 12 months period..

South Korea.notes: All visitors are fingerprinted. From September 2021, travelers require the Korean Electronic Travel Authorization (K-ETA). The validity period is 3 years from the date of approval..

Kyrgyzstan.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Manas International Airport or Osh Airport or through land crossings with China (at Irkeshtam and Torugart ), Kazakhstan (at Ak-jol, Ak-Tilek, Chaldybar, Chon-Kapka ), Tajikistan (at Bor-Dobo, Kulundu, Kyzyl-Bel ) and Uzbekistan (at Dostuk )..

Laos.notes: 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges, in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ).. Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings..

Latvia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Lebanon.notes: Visa waiver granted if there is no Israeli visa or seal and traveler has a telephone number, an address in Lebanon, and a non refundable return or circle trip ticket..

Liechtenstein.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Lithuania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Luxembourg.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Malaysia.notes: All visitors are fingerprinted on arrival and departure.. Immigration offenses, such as visa overstaying, are punishable by caning..

Malta.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Marshall Islands.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Montenegro.notes: Registration with the local police within 24 hours of arrival is mandatory..

Mozambique.notes: Travelers must register on the e-Visa platform at least 48 hours prior to travel and pay a processing fee of 650 MT..

Myanmar.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Yangon, Nay Pyi Taw or Mandalay airports or via land border crossings with Thailand — Tachileik, Myawaddy and Kawthaung or India — Rih Khaw Dar and Tamu.. e-Visa is available for tourism only..

Namibia.notes: Available at Hosea Kutako International Airport, Kalahari Border Crossing and Walvis Bay Airport..

Nepal.notes: Obtainable at Tribhuvan International Airport and certain land borders.. Total aggregate stay of no more than 150 days in any given calendar year..

Netherlands.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

New Zealand.notes: International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy must be paid upon requesting an Electronic Travel Authority.. Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure. Such travellers are not required to pay the International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy..

Nicaragua.notes: Tourist card must be purchased upon arrival..

Nigeria.notes: Holders of written e-Visa approval issued by Immigration Authority can obtain a visa on arrival, provided holding a visa application form and e-Visa application payment receipt and holding an invitation letter from Nigerian company accepting immigration responsibilities.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required if arriving from a country with a risk of yellow fever transmission..

North Macedonia.notes: Registration with the local police within 24 hours of arrival is mandatory..

Norway.notes: 3 months within a 6-month period, regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries, but including time spent in other Nordic countries..

Oman.notes: Holders of a visa or entrance stamp of the Emirate of Dubai that is valid for at least 21 days are visa exempt.. Holders of a visa for Qatar that is valid for travel to Oman and valid for at least one month are visa exempt when arriving directly from Qatar..

Panama.notes: Denial of entry or transit to any person who has a criminal conviction..

Papua New Guinea.notes: Available at Gurney Airport (Alotau), Mount Hagen Airport, Port Moresby Airport and Tokua Airport (Rabaul)..

Paraguay.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.. Uruguayans can live and work legally in Paraguay under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Peru.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old.. Uruguayans can live and work legally in Peru under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Poland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Portugal.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Romania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Rwanda.notes: Visitors are fingerprinted. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

São Tomé and Príncipe.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Senegal.notes: Visa not required for passengers with an official invitation letter.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Seychelles.notes: Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.. Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.. Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country..

Sierra Leone.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Singapore.notes: All visitors are fingerprinted upon arrival and departure.

Slovakia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Slovenia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

South Africa.notes: Holders of passports without 2 blank pages may be refused entry..

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online.. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel..

Spain.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Suriname.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available..

Sweden.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Switzerland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Syria.notes: Visa not required for foreign citizens with proof of Syrian origin, such as an identification card or passport.. Dual-citizen males ages 17–42 need military service book..

Timor-Leste.notes: Not available at all entry points..

Uganda.notes: Determined at the port of entry.. Must apply online at least 2 business days prior to travel.. Airlines may deny passengers permission to board flights to Uganda without proof that they had successfully applied for an e-Visa.. Ugandan immigration authorities may require additional documentation, including proof of a return plane ticket and detailed tour itinerary in Uganda.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

United Arab Emirates.notes: Extension possible with a fee.. Iris scan taken on arrival..

United Kingdom.notes: ETA required.. Up to 90 days if arriving from Ireland ( Common Travel Area )..

Uzbekistan.notes: 5-day visa-free transit at the international airports if holding a confirmed onward ticket for a flight to a third country..

Vatican City.notes: Open borders but de facto follows Italian visa policy.. No foreign accommodations, residency restricted to Vatican citizens only..

Venezuela.notes: Entry is allowed with a valid Uruguayan identity card that is less than 10 years old..

Vietnam.notes: Phú Quốc visa exemption for up to 30 days..

Yemen.notes: Registration mandatory.. Exit visa required for stays over 30 days..

Zambia.notes: Also eligible for a universal visa allowing access to Zimbabwe.. All visitors are fingerprinted.. Two blank pages required.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Zimbabwe.notes: Also eligible for a universal visa allowing access to Zambia.. Tourism purposes only..

Isla Apipé and Isla del medio.stay: By being Argentine territories, the same visa policy applies. [ citation needed ].

Palestine.stay: Arrival by sea to Gaza Strip not allowed.

Somaliland.stay: 30 days for 30 USD, payable on arrival.

Sudan outside Khartoum.stay: All foreigners traveling more than 25 kilometers outside of Khartoum must obtain a travel permit..

Protected and restricted areas of India.stay: Protected Area Permit (PAP) required for whole states of Nagaland and Sikkim and parts of states Manipur, Arunachal Pradesh, Uttaranchal, Jammu and Kashmir, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh.. Restricted Area Permit (RAP) required for all of Andaman and Nicobar Islands and parts of Sikkim.. Some of these requirements are occasionally lifted for a year..

Baikonur & Priozersk.stay: Special permission required for the city of Baikonur and surrounding areas in Kyzylorda Oblast, and the town of Priozersk near Almaty..

Kish Island.stay: Tourists for Kish Island do not require a visa..

Maldives outside Malé.stay: Tourists are generally prohibited from visiting non-resort islands without the express permission of the Government of the Maldives..

Gorno-Badakhshan Autonomous Province.stay: OIVR permit required.. Special permit required for Lake Sarez..

Tibet Autonomous Region.stay: Tibet Travel Permit required in addition to Chinese visa..

Closed cities of Turkmenistan.stay: A special permit, issued prior to arrival by Ministry of Foreign Affairs, is required if visiting the following places: Atamurat, Cheleken, Dashoguz, Serakhs and Serhetabat..

Brest and Grodno.requirement: Visa not required [ may be outdated as of February 2022 ]

Crimea.requirement: Visa not required [ may be outdated as of February 2022 ]

Closed cities of Russia.stay: Several closed cities and regions in Russia require special authorization. [ citation needed ].

South Ossetia.stay: Multiple entry visa to Russia and three-day prior notification are required to enter South Ossetia..
